title: Beyond chatbots: How AI agents built a full OS, web apps, and more
summary: Google showcases AI agents executing long-running, multi-day pipelines to build non-trivial software including operating systems and optimized web applications. The presentation demonstrates agents handling dependent chains of complex engineering problems beyond traditional chatbot capabilities.
